---
title: "HTS_Rubus_May2025"
author: "Karmun Chooi"
date: "2025-05-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.


```{r}
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("tidyr")
install.packages("purrr")
install.packages("data.table")
install.packages("ggplot2")
install.packages("DataExplorer")
install.packages("summarytools")
install.packages("ggrepel")
# install.packages("fs")
install.packages("readr")

library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(magrittr)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(DataExplorer)
library(summarytools)
library(ggrepel)
# library(fs)
library(readr)

```


```{r database metadata input}
# NCBI_AllVirus_nt_DB_July2024 <- read.csv("/powerplant/input/genomic/viral/NCBI_DBs/nt_19July2024/nt_19July2024_Virus_sequences_Metadata.csv", sep = ",", head = TRUE)
# 
# colnames(NCBI_AllVirus_nt_DB_July2024)[colnames(NCBI_AllVirus_nt_DB_July2024) == "Accession"] <- "Accession.Ver"
# 
# # colnames(NCBI_AllVirus_nt_DB_AUG2023)[colnames(NCBI_AllVirus_nt_DB_AUG2023) == "Accession"] <- "Accession.Ver"


NCBI_VirusNonHuman_nt_DB_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/input/genomic/viral/NCBI_DBs/NCBI_NonHumanViral_nt_May2025/Metadata_NCBI_NonHumanViral_nt_May2025.csv", sep = ",", head = TRUE)

colnames(NCBI_VirusNonHuman_nt_DB_May2025)[colnames(NCBI_VirusNonHuman_nt_DB_May2025) == "Accession"] <- "Accession.Ver"



NCBI_VirusNonHuman_aa_DB_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/input/genomic/viral/NCBI_DBs/NCBI_NonHumanViral_nr_May2025/Metadata_NCBI_NonHumanViral_nr_May2025.csv", sep = ",", head = TRUE)

NCBI_VirusNonHuman_aa_DB_May2025$Protein <- gsub(",", "-", NCBI_VirusNonHuman_aa_DB_May2025$Protein)

```

```{r nt data input}
# Pool 1
HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_blastn_saccver_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/009.blastn/NCBI_NonHumanViral_nt_May2025/Pool1_nt_names.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_blastn_saccver_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession",	"Accession.Ver", "pident",	"staxid",	"ssciname",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 

HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
   dplyr::mutate(coverage = length/qlen) %>%
  left_join(NCBI_VirusNonHuman_nt_DB_May2025, by = c("Accession.Ver")) -> Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_blastn_saccver_May2025


# Pool 2
HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_blastn_saccver_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/009.blastn/NCBI_NonHumanViral_nt_May2025/Pool2_nt_names.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_blastn_saccver_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession",	"Accession.Ver", "pident",	"staxid",	"ssciname",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 

HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
   dplyr::mutate(coverage = length/qlen) %>%
  left_join(NCBI_VirusNonHuman_nt_DB_May2025, by = c("Accession.Ver")) -> Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_blastn_saccver_May2025

# Pool 3
HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/009.blastn/NCBI_NonHumanViral_nt_May2025/Pool3_nt_names.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession",	"Accession.Ver", "pident",	"staxid",	"ssciname",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 

HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
   dplyr::mutate(coverage = length/qlen) %>%
  left_join(NCBI_VirusNonHuman_nt_DB_May2025, by = c("Accession.Ver")) -> Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025



```


```{r nt analysis}

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>100) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    dplyr::select(c("qseqid", "Accession","pident","Organism_Name","Species","length","sstart", "send","Genus","Family","Molecule_type")) %>%
  filter(Family != "Coronaviridae" & Family!= "Flaviviridae" & Family!= "Retroviridae" & Family != "Inoviridae" & Family!= "Iflaviridae" & Family!= "Narnaviridae" & Family!= "Picornaviridae" & Species != "Picornavirales sp." & Species !="Hubei reo-like virus 5" & Family != "Togaviridae" & Family != "Orthomyxoviridae" & Family != "Mitoviridae", Family != "Circoviridae" & Family != "Microviridae" & Family != "") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("human", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("phage", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("Rubus yellow net virus", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send")) #%>%
  #write.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/VietFruit/TotalRNA_Apr24B/nt/Results_100bp_VFApr2024B_L1_blastn_JUL2024.csv", sep = "", quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)


Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>100) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    dplyr::select(c("qseqid", "Accession","pident","Organism_Name","Species","length","sstart", "send","Genus","Family","Molecule_type")) %>%
  filter(Family != "Coronaviridae" & Family!= "Flaviviridae" & Family!= "Retroviridae" & Family != "Inoviridae" & Family!= "Iflaviridae" & Family!= "Narnaviridae" & Family!= "Picornaviridae" & Species != "Picornavirales sp." & Species !="Hubei reo-like virus 5" & Family != "Togaviridae" & Family != "Orthomyxoviridae" & Family != "Mitoviridae", Family != "Circoviridae" & Family != "Microviridae" & Family != "") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("human", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("phage", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("Rubus yellow net virus", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send"))


Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>100) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    dplyr::select(c("qseqid", "Accession","pident","Organism_Name","Species","length","sstart", "send","Genus","Family","Molecule_type")) %>%
  filter(Family != "Coronaviridae" & Family!= "Flaviviridae" & Family!= "Retroviridae" & Family != "Inoviridae" & Family!= "Iflaviridae" & Family!= "Narnaviridae" & Family!= "Picornaviridae" & Species != "Picornavirales sp." & Species !="Hubei reo-like virus 5" & Family != "Togaviridae" & Family != "Orthomyxoviridae" & Family != "Mitoviridae", Family != "Circoviridae" & Family != "Microviridae" & Family != "") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("human", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("phage", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send"))


```

```{r nucleotide combine csv outputs}
#Trying to merge of the dataframes together

# Get the names of all 19 dataframes (assuming they follow a pattern or are selected manually)
nt_df_names <- c("Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_blastn_saccver_May2025", "Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_blastn_saccver_May2025", "Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025")

# Combine them with a new column indicating the source
combined_nt_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df <- map_dfr(nt_df_names, ~ {
  df <- get(.x)         # get the dataframe by name
  df$source_df <- .x    # add a column with the name
  df                   # return modified df
})


# Write the combined data to a new CSV file
write.csv(combined_nt_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df, "/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/HTS_Rubus_May2025/combined_data_nt_Rubus_May2025.csv")


combined_nt_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send", "coverage", "evalue","source_df")) %>%
  write.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/HTS_Rubus_May2025/uniqueIDs_combined_data_nt_Rubus_May2025.csv", sep = "", quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)

```


```{r amino acid data input}

#Library  1
HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/010.blastx/NCBI_Diamond_VirusNonHuman_DB_May2025/Pool1_aa_names_Diamond.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession","pident",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 

HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025 %>%
   dplyr::mutate(coverage = length/(qlen/3)) %>%
  left_join(NCBI_VirusNonHuman_aa_DB_May2025, by = c("Accession")) -> Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_May2025

#Library  2
HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/010.blastx/NCBI_Diamond_VirusNonHuman_DB_May2025/Pool2_aa_names_Diamond.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession","pident",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 

HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025 %>%
   dplyr::mutate(coverage = length/(qlen/3)) %>%
  left_join(NCBI_VirusNonHuman_aa_DB_May2025, by = c("Accession")) -> Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_May2025


#Library  3
HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/010.blastx/NCBI_Diamond_VirusNonHuman_DB_May2025/Pool3_aa_names_Diamond.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession","pident",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 

HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_saccver_May2025 %>%
   dplyr::mutate(coverage = length/(qlen/3)) %>%
  left_join(NCBI_VirusNonHuman_aa_DB_May2025, by = c("Accession")) -> Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_May2025

```


```{r}
Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>30) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    dplyr::select(c("qseqid", "Accession","pident","Organism_Name","Species","length","sstart", "send","Genus","Family","Molecule_type","coverage", "evalue")) %>%
  filter(Family != "Coronaviridae" & Family!= "Flaviviridae" & Family!= "Retroviridae" & Family != "Inoviridae" & Family!= "Iflaviridae" & Family!= "Narnaviridae" & Family!= "Picornaviridae" & Species != "Picornavirales sp." & Species !="Hubei reo-like virus 5" & Family != "Togaviridae" & Family != "Orthomyxoviridae" & Family != "Mitoviridae", Family != "Circoviridae" & Family != "Microviridae" & Family != "") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("human", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("phage", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send","coverage", "evalue")) ->
  Filtered30aa_Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_May2025

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>30) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    dplyr::select(c("qseqid", "Accession","pident","Organism_Name","Species","length","sstart", "send","Genus","Family","Molecule_type","coverage", "evalue")) %>%
  filter(Family != "Coronaviridae" & Family!= "Flaviviridae" & Family!= "Retroviridae" & Family != "Inoviridae" & Family!= "Iflaviridae" & Family!= "Narnaviridae" & Family!= "Picornaviridae" & Species != "Picornavirales sp." & Species !="Hubei reo-like virus 5" & Family != "Togaviridae" & Family != "Orthomyxoviridae" & Family != "Mitoviridae", Family != "Circoviridae" & Family != "Microviridae" & Family != "") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("human", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("phage", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send","coverage", "evalue")) ->
  Filtered30aa_Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_May2025

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>30) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    dplyr::select(c("qseqid", "Accession","pident","Organism_Name","Species","length","sstart", "send","Genus","Family","Molecule_type","coverage", "evalue")) %>%
  filter(Family != "Coronaviridae" & Family!= "Flaviviridae" & Family!= "Retroviridae" & Family != "Inoviridae" & Family!= "Iflaviridae" & Family!= "Narnaviridae" & Family!= "Picornaviridae" & Species != "Picornavirales sp." & Species !="Hubei reo-like virus 5" & Family != "Togaviridae" & Family != "Orthomyxoviridae" & Family != "Mitoviridae", Family != "Circoviridae" & Family != "Microviridae" & Family != "") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("human", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("phage", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send","coverage", "evalue")) ->
  Filtered30aa_Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_May2025
  #%>%
  #write.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/VietFruit/TotalRNA_Apr24B/aa/Results_100bp_VFApr2024B_L1_blastx_JUL2024.csv", sep = "", quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)


create_report(Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_May2025)

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_May2025 %>%
  #filter(length>100) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
      filter(Family != "Coronaviridae" & Family!= "Flaviviridae" & Family!= "Retroviridae" & Family != "Inoviridae" & Family!= "Iflaviridae" & Family!= "Narnaviridae" & Family!= "Picornaviridae" & Species != "Picornavirales sp." & Species !="Hubei reo-like virus 5" & Family != "Togaviridae" & Family != "Orthomyxoviridae" & Family != "Mitoviridae", Family != "Circoviridae" & Family != "Microviridae" & Family != "") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("human", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("phage", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  count(Tissue_Specimen_Source, sort = TRUE)

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_May2025 %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("human", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Species, regex("phage", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  #filter(str_detect(Tissue_Specimen_Source, regex("plant", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  count(Organism_Name, Genus, sort = TRUE)

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_May2025 %>%
  filter(str_detect(Tissue_Specimen_Source, regex("plant", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  count(Organism_Name, Genus, sort = TRUE)

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_May2025 %>%
  filter(str_detect(Tissue_Specimen_Source, regex("plant", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  count(Organism_Name, Genus, sort = TRUE)

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
  filter(str_detect(Tissue_Specimen_Source, regex("plant", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  count(Organism_Name, sort = TRUE)




```

```{r amino acid combine csv outputs}
#Trying to merge of the dataframes together

# Get the names of all 19 dataframes (assuming they follow a pattern or are selected manually)
aa_df_names <- c("Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_May2025", "Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_May2025", "Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_May2025")

# Combine them with a new column indicating the source
combined_aa_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df <- map_dfr(aa_df_names, ~ {
  df <- get(.x)         # get the dataframe by name
  df$source_df <- .x    # add a column with the name
  df                   # return modified df
})


# Write the combined data to a new CSV file
write.csv(combined_aa_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df, "/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/HTS_Rubus_May2025/combined_data_aa_Rubus_May2025.csv")


combined_aa_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send", "coverage", "evalue","source_df")) %>%
  write.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/HTS_Rubus_May2025/uniqueIDs_combined_data_aa_Rubus_May2025.csv", sep = "", quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)



# Get the names of all 19 dataframes (assuming they follow a pattern or are selected manually)
Filtered_30_aa_df_names <- c("Filtered30aa_Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_Diamondblastx_May2025", "Filtered30aa_Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_Diamondblastx_May2025", "Filtered30aa_Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_Diamondblastx_May2025")

# Combine them with a new column indicating the source
combined_Filtered_30_aa_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df <- map_dfr(Filtered_30_aa_df_names, ~ {
  df <- get(.x)         # get the dataframe by name
  df$source_df <- .x    # add a column with the name
  df                   # return modified df
})


# Write the combined data to a new CSV file
write.csv(combined_Filtered_30_aa_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df, "/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/HTS_Rubus_May2025/Filtered_30_combined_data_aa_Rubus_May2025.csv")


combined_Filtered_30_aa_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::select(c("pident","Accession","qseqid", "Organism_Name","Species", "Genus","Family", "length","sstart", "send", "coverage", "evalue","source_df")) %>%
  write.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/HTS_Rubus_May2025/Filtered_30_uniqueIDs_combined_data_aa_Rubus_May2025.csv", sep = "", quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)


```

```{r nt data input}
# Pool 1
HTSRUBUS2025_Phytoplasma_Pool1_blastn_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/009.blastn/NCBI_CandidatusPhytoplasma_nt_July2025/Pool1_nt_names.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Phytoplasma_Pool1_blastn_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession",	"Accession.Ver", "pident",	"staxid",	"ssciname",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 


# Pool 2
HTSRUBUS2025_Phytoplasma_Pool2_blastn_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/009.blastn/NCBI_CandidatusPhytoplasma_nt_July2025/Pool2_nt_names.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Phytoplasma_Pool2_blastn_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession",	"Accession.Ver", "pident",	"staxid",	"ssciname",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 

# Pool 3
HTSRUBUS2025_Phytoplasma_Pool3_blastn_May2025 <- read.csv("/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/HTS_Rubus_May2025/009.blastn/NCBI_CandidatusPhytoplasma_nt_July2025/Pool3_nt_names.csv", sep="", head = FALSE) 

colnames(HTSRUBUS2025_Phytoplasma_Pool3_blastn_May2025) <- c("qseqid",	"Accession",	"Accession.Ver", "pident",	"staxid",	"ssciname",	"length",	"mismatch",	"gapopen",	"qstart",	"qend",	"sstart",	"send",	"evalue",	"bitscore",	"qlen") 


```

```{r RYNV contigs}
Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>100) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    filter(str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("Rubus yellow net virus", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("qseqid")) -> Contigs_RYNV_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>100) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    filter(str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("Rubus yellow net virus", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("qseqid")) -> Contigs_RYNV_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2

Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025 %>%
  filter(length>100) %>%
  # filter(coverage > 0.4) %>%
  # filter(pident > 50) %>%
    filter(str_detect(Organism_Name, regex("Rubus yellow net virus", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  distinct(qseqid,.keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(length))%>%
  dplyr::select(c("qseqid")) -> Contigs_RYNV_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3
```

```{r nucleotide combine csv outputs}
#Trying to merge of the dataframes together

# Get the names of all 19 dataframes (assuming they follow a pattern or are selected manually)
nt_df_names <- c("Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool1_blastn_saccver_May2025", "Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool2_blastn_saccver_May2025", "Merge_HTSRUBUS2025_Pool3_blastn_saccver_May2025")

# Combine them with a new column indicating the source
combined_nt_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df <- map_dfr(nt_df_names, ~ {
  df <- get(.x)         # get the dataframe by name
  df$source_df <- .x    # add a column with the name
  df                   # return modified df
})


# Write the combined data to a new CSV file
write.csv(combined_nt_HTSRUBUS2025_May2025_df, "/powerplant/workspace/hrakmc/RStudio/HTS_Rubus_May2025/combined_Contigs_RubusYellowNetVirus.csv")




```
